upasargachandrika.example_text: 'SvAsAparaktADaraH' (SA॰) aparaktaH=apagatarAgaH=apagatalOhityaH vivarRaH
'nUnaM mitrARi te rakzaH sADUpacaritAnyapi svadozAdaparajyante' (rA॰) anurAgaM tyajantItyAha
pitrA'paraYjitAstasya prajAstenAnuraYjitAH' (hari॰1.5.30 vi॰pu॰1.13.48) aparaYjitAH=aparAgaM gamitA udvejitAH
'citADUmena nIlena saMrajyante ca pAdapAH' (BA॰SAM॰153.99) saMrajyante=varRyante citADUmo rAgastena tadvarRAH kriyante
'saMraktataramatyarTaM maDuraM nAvagAyatAm' (rA॰Slegala saM॰1.4.17) saMraktataram=raYjakataram cetoharam
'saMraktABistripuravijayo gIyate kinnarIBiH' (meGa॰57) saMraktABiH=raktakaRWIBiH atinirhAriRIBiH
'ko'yaM netraH samaBirajyate' (BA0 SAM0 33216) sarAgo Bavati saMraktanayanaH sampadyata ityarTaH
'cakorasya virajyete nayane vizadarSanAt' (kA0 nI0 sA0 712) virajyete nisargajaM svavarRaM hArayata ityAha
'kokilasyAkziRI virajyete' (kO0 a0 12017)
'keSA api virajyante niHsnehAH kiM na sevakAH' (paYcata0 182) virajyante vigatarAgA Bavanti svaM varRaM jahati sitimAnamApadyante pakzAntare tyaktAnurAgA jAyante rUkzA BavantItyarTaH
'cirAnuraktopi virajyate janaH' (mfcCa0 15) virajyate virakto Bavati
'SrIrnizkuzyati laNkAyAM virajyanti samfdDayaH' (Bawwi0 1822) virajyanti=apayAnti OpacArikaH prayogaH
'tadArtavaM praSaMsanti yadvAso na viraYjayet' (suSrute 131510) na viraYjayet=nANkitaM kuryAt na kalaNkitaM vidaDyAt
'raktAd vfttiM samIheta viraktasya vivarjayet' (kA0 nI0 sA0 546) virakta udAsInaH
'sEvAmftalatA raktA viravatA vizavallarI' (kaTA0 33185) viraktA nizpraRayA
'viraktasanDyAkapiSaM purastAt' (raGu0 1364) viraktA viSezeRa raktA lohitA
'viraktaH pravrajed DImAn saMraktastu gfhe vaset' (nArada0) virakto'nAsaktaH
'yAM cintayAmi satataM mayi sA viraktA' (Bartf0)
'virAgakAraRezu parihftezu' (mudrA0 1) virAgo'nurAgABAvaH nizpraRayatA
'AraktAScEva niryAsAH' (vi0 pu0 3179) AraktA Izad raktAH
'yasmAnme mana udiva rArajIti' (aTarva0 6712) BfSaM saMrajyate
'na kaTABiraBirajyante' kaTAsu nABiramante ityarTaH
'(gItam) saMraktamaBiraktaM ca parayA svarasampadA' (rA gore0 1361) aBiraktaM prAptasaMmadam
'vyavahArezvasADyAnAM loke vA pratirajyatAm' (pratijYA0 33)
'uparajyate BagavAMScandraH' (mudrA0 1) rAhuRA gfhyate
'kopoparaktAni muKAni' (sA0 da0) uparaktAni aruRAni upaSabdo DAtvarTAnuvAdI
'avidyAkAmakarmaBiruparaktamanasA' (BA0 pu0 5145) uparaktamupahataM malinIkftam kaluzitam
'uparakta ivAdityaH sadyo nizpraBatAM gataH' (rA0 1559) uparakto grahagfhItaH upaplutaH
'aTa ya uparaktena havizA yajate' (Sa0 brA0 11445) uparaktena Izad raktena upaSabdaH sAmIpye
'candroparAgaM prati tu kenApi vipralabDAsi' (mudrA0 1) candroparAgaScandragrahaRam
'biBarzi cAkAramanirvftAnAM mfRAlinI hEmamivoparAgam' (raGu0 167) uparAga upadravaH himakftA mlAniH
'ityAdiBiH samAlApErvatsarAjaH sa tad dinam lajjjoparAgaM devyASca samamevApanItavAn' (kaTA0 1752).. uparAgo mAlinyam
'urvIpateSca sPawikASmanaSca SIlojJitastrIhfdayasya cAntaH asaMniDAnAt satatasTitInAmanyoparAgaH kurute praveSam' (rAja0 6234).. uparAgaH saMnihitavastvantarasya rAgaH upaSabdaH sAmIpye
